activity._note: Granular DAU/WAU/MAU and new-address counts for LINK require Glassnode paid tier (Glassnode free tier exposes only BTC/ETH address metrics). Dune Analytics public dashboards exist for Chainlink oracle activity but do NOT expose a canonical LINK token DAU dashboard freely queryable via API without a Dune account/API key. DefiLlama does not publish a LINK-specific active-users page. Values cannot be responsibly fabricated.

exchange_flows._note: Coinglass public pages show exchange flow charts for BTC and ETH prominently; LINK exchange-flow time-series data in USD is behind Coinglass Pro. Glassnode exchange flow for LINK (exchange_flow_in_usd, exchange_flow_out_usd) requires at least Glassnode Advanced tier — not available on the free tier. No freely scrapable endpoint confirmed as of 2025-07-14.

holder_cohort._note: Glassnode LTH/STH supply split for ERC-20 tokens including LINK is a paid-tier metric (Glassnode Advanced/Institutional). No free public equivalent confirmed on DefiLlama, Etherscan, or Coinglass public pages. Etherscan token holder list (https://etherscan.io/token/0x514910771af9ca656af840dff83e8264ecf986ca#balances) shows top-holder concentration but does NOT classify holders by holding duration.

wash_trade_concerns: Volume organicity cannot be definitively assessed without paid exchange-flow and order-book data; however, LINK trades on Tier-1 venues (Binance, Coinbase, Kraken) with deep order books, and CoinGecko's trust-score methodology (https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/chainlink) rates its top exchanges highly, suggesting volume is largely organic, though smaller CEX pairs warrant caution.
rationale: All granular on-chain activity metrics (DAU, WAU, MAU, new addresses, exchange flows, LTH/STH cohorts) for LINK as an ERC-20 token are gated behind paid tiers on the only platforms (Glassnode, Coinglass Pro, Nansen) that compute them reliably. Free-tier sources — Etherscan, CoinGecko, DefiLlama, and Coinglass public — provide price, market cap, top-holder snapshots, and protocol TVL but not the time-series on-chain behavioral metrics requested. Fabricating numbers would be misleading; the honest answer is PARTIAL/UNAVAILABLE for this specific data request on free sources.
sources: https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/chainlink — price, volume, market cap, exchange trust scores (free)
https://etherscan.io/token/0x514910771af9ca656af840dff83e8264ecf986ca#balances — top holder list snapshot (free, no duration classification)
https://defillama.com/protocol/chainlink — Chainlink protocol TVL (free; no LINK token DAU page exists)
https://glassnode.com/metrics — confirms LINK exchange flow & address metrics exist but are Advanced/Institutional tier only
https://coinglass.com/LiquidationData — LINK liquidation data publicly visible; exchange flow for LINK is Pro tier
https://dune.com/browse/dashboards?q=chainlink — public Chainlink dashboards exist (oracle calls, node operators) but no canonical free LINK token DAU dashboard with API access confirmed
